regional_cost_note: Stonemasons in Gisborne typically charge $360–$750/m² for natural stone walls, $210–$480/m² for stone paving, and $420–$950/m² for heritage restoration. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Heritage stonework requires specialist skills — always check the mason's portfolio of similar work.
